_comment: REFERENCE ONLY — this file does not configure Claude Code behavior. It documents the optimization configuration that should be active via CLAUDE.md instructions and Serena setup.

symbol_first_exploration.rule: Always use mcp__serena__ tools before Read tool for code files

memory_system.rule: Load memories at session start before any file exploration

prompt_caching.rule: Automatic — no action required beyond having content >= 1024 tokens

pattern_reuse.rule: Search for existing patterns before generating new code
